mapper.sql: from payment_business_order bo left join payment_enterprise_subject s on s.id = bo.subject_id and s.tenant_id = bo.tenant_id left join payment_application app on app.tenant_id = bo.tenant_id and app.del_flag = 0 and (app.app_id = bo.app_code or bo.app_code = case when app.app_id = 'app_order_center' then 'ORDER_CENTER' when app.app_id = 'app_member_center' then 'MEMBER_CENTER' else app.app_id end)

(select c.id from payment_application app join payment_cashier_config c on c.application_id = app.id and c.tenant_id = app.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0 and c.status = 1 where app.tenant_id = bo.tenant_id and app.del_flag = 0 and app.status = 1 and (app.app_id = bo.app_code or bo.app_code = case when app.app_id = 'app_order_center' then 'ORDER_CENTER' when app.app_id = 'app_member_center' then 'MEMBER_CENTER' else app.app_id end) and find_in_set(cast(bo.subject_id as char), c.enterprise_subject_ids) order by c.default_cashier desc, c.updated_at desc, c.id desc limit 1)

(select c.cashier_name from payment_application app join payment_cashier_config c on c.application_id = app.id and c.tenant_id = app.tenant_id and c.del_flag = 0 and c.status = 1 where app.tenant_id = bo.tenant_id and app.del_flag = 0 and app.status = 1 and (app.app_id = bo.app_code or bo.app_code = case when app.app_id = 'app_order_center' then 'ORDER_CENTER' when app.app_id = 'app_member_center' then 'MEMBER_CENTER' else app.app_id end) and find_in_set(cast(bo.subject_id as char), c.enterprise_subject_ids) order by c.default_cashier desc, c.updated_at desc, c.id desc limit 1)

select bo.id, bo.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, bo.app_code as appId, app.app_name as appName, bo.title, bo.subject_id as subjectId, s.subject_name as subjectName, as cashierConfigId, as cashierName, bo.amount, bo.paid_amount as paidAmount, bo.refunded_amount as refundedAmount, bo.currency, bo.status, bo.expire_time as expireTime, bo.notify_url as notifyUrl, bo.return_url as returnUrl, bo.extend_info as extendInfo, bo.created_at as createTime, bo.updated_at as updateTime, (select count(1) from payment_order po where po.tenant_id = bo.tenant_id and po.business_order_id = bo.id) as paymentOrderCount, (select count(1) from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id where ro.tenant_id = bo.tenant_id and po.business_order_id = bo.id) as refundOrderCount
mapper.select: order by bo.created_at desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select bo.id, bo.biz_order_no as bizOrderNo, bo.app_code as appCode, bo.title, bo.subject_id as subjectId, bo.amount, bo.paid_amount as paidAmount, bo.refunded_amount as refundedAmount, bo.currency, bo.status, bo.expire_time as expireTime, bo.notify_url as notifyUrl, bo.return_url as returnUrl, bo.extend_info as extendInfo, bo.tenant_id as tenantId, bo.created_by as createdBy, bo.created_at as createdAt, bo.updated_by as updatedBy, bo.updated_at as updatedAt, bo.del_flag as delFlag from payment_business_order bo where bo.id = #{id} and bo.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bo.del_flag = 0 limit 1
mapper.update: update payment_business_order set status = 'PAID', paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0 and status = 'PAYING'
update payment_business_order set status = 'PAYING', updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0 and status in ('TO_PAY', 'PAYING')

update payment_business_order set status = 'CLOSED', updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0 and status in ('TO_PAY', 'PAYING') and coalesce(paid_amount, 0) = 0

update payment_business_order set refunded_amount = refunded_amount + #{refundAmount}, status = case when refunded_amount + #{refundAmount} >= amount then 'REFUNDED' else 'PARTIAL_REFUNDED' end, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{tenantId} and del_flag = 0 and status in ('PAID', 'SUCCESS', 'PARTIAL_REFUNDED') and refunded_amount + #{refundAmount} <= amount
